mainAIUseCase: Fraud detection for real-time transaction monitoring
painPoints: Struggling with Kubernetes complexity and GPU resource allocation. Need better documentation for air-gapped deployments.
featureFeedback: AutoML features are great but need more control over hyperparameters
pmComments: High priority - large account with 500+ data scientists. Considering expansion to 3 more business units.
meetingNotes:
Call on 4/15: Customer has 500+ data scientists currently using a mix of on-prem tools. Main pain point is K8s complexity - they have a small ops team. Interested in our managed offering but concerned about data residency. Follow-up scheduled for 5/1 to discuss architecture.

Call on 5/1: Discussed hybrid deployment model. Customer wants to start with on-prem pilot in Q3, then evaluate cloud migration. They're expanding to 3 more business units (insurance, investment banking, retail banking) - each has different compliance requirements. Need to loop in their InfoSec team.

painPoints: Model deployment pipeline is too complex. Need better integration with existing CI/CD tools.
pmComments: Interested in expanding to computer vision use cases next quarter
meetingNotes:
Initial demo on 4/20: Maria was impressed with model serving latency. They're currently using a custom Jenkins pipeline that takes 2-3 days to deploy models to production. Want to see if we can reduce that to hours.

Technical deep-dive on 5/10: Their DevOps team joined. Main blocker is integration with their existing GitLab CI/CD. Need to provide custom pipeline examples. Also interested in A/B testing capabilities for model rollouts.

mainAIUseCase: Network anomaly detection and automated remediation
painPoints: Air-gapped environment makes model updates challenging. Need offline model registry solution.
featureFeedback: AutoX automation features are exactly what we need
pmComments: Critical security requirements due to telecom regulations. Very interested in enterprise support. UPDATE: They want to pilot with 3 data centers in Q3.
meetingNotes:
Discovery call 3/10: David's team monitors network traffic across 50+ data centers. Current solution uses rule-based alerting with high false positive rate. They need ML-based anomaly detection that can run completely air-gapped (no internet connectivity for security). Models need to be updated quarterly via physical media.

Architecture review 4/15: Discussed offline model registry design. They're willing to pay for enterprise support if we can meet their air-gap requirements. Potential expansion to 200+ edge locations if pilot succeeds.

Feedback session 5/25: Pilot went well in test environment. Ready to move to production pilot with 3 data centers. Main ask: need better documentation for air-gapped model updates and monitoring setup.

painPoints: HIPAA compliance requirements make data handling complex. Need better data governance tools.
featureFeedback: Data versioning features are very helpful
pmComments: Pilot project with radiology department. Success could lead to hospital-wide adoption.
meetingNotes:
Discovery call 5/1: Dr. Johnson leads the radiology AI initiative. They want to start with chest X-ray analysis to assist radiologists. Current workflow has radiologists reviewing 100+ images per day - they want AI to flag potential issues for priority review.

Compliance discussion 5/15: Their legal team joined to discuss HIPAA requirements. All PHI must stay on-prem, no cloud backup. Need detailed audit logs of who accessed which models and when. Also need data anonymization tools for model training.

mainAIUseCase: Conversational AI for customer service automation
painPoints: Need better RAG performance and lower latency. Token costs are concerning at scale.
featureFeedback: Agentic framework is powerful but has steep learning curve
pmComments: Planning to deploy to 500+ retail locations. Cost model is key concern.
meetingNotes:
Initial meeting 4/25: Amanda's team wants to replace their current IVR system with AI agents that can handle common customer service queries. Currently spending $2M/year on call center - want to reduce by 40%.

Technical evaluation 5/10: Tested our agentic framework with their product catalog (50k items). Latency is acceptable but token costs are 3x their budget. Need to optimize RAG retrieval and explore local model options.

Cost review 5/19: Proposed hybrid approach - use smaller local models for simple queries, escalate complex ones to larger models. This brings costs within budget. Ready to move forward with pilot in 10 stores.

painPoints: Strict air-gap requirements. No internet access for model downloads. Security compliance is paramount.
featureFeedback: Performance is good but setup complexity is high
pmComments: High security clearance required. Potential for multi-million dollar contract if POC succeeds.

mainAIUseCase: Credit risk modeling and portfolio optimization
painPoints: Model explainability requirements for regulatory compliance. Need better interpretability tools.
pmComments: EU AI Act compliance is top priority. Willing to invest heavily if we can help them meet requirements.

mainAIUseCase: Grid optimization and renewable energy forecasting
painPoints: Need better support for time-series data and edge deployment for grid sensors.
pmComments: Expansion to 50+ wind farms planned if POC succeeds

painPoints: Real-time inference latency is too high. Need sub-100ms response times.
pmComments: Serving 50M+ users. Performance at scale is critical.

mainAIUseCase: Automated claims processing and fraud detection
painPoints: Model drift detection and automated retraining needed. Claims data changes frequently.
pmComments: Processing 100K+ claims per month. Automation ROI is huge.
